0.q: an interaction between CgCDPK (protein kinase) and CgbHLH001 (TF) from a halophyte Chenopodium glaucum was further dissected

2.q: the probable nature between the CgCDPK and CgbHLH001 interaction was the phosphorylation, and the N-terminus of CgbHLH001, especially the 96th serine (the potential phosphorylation site) within it, was essential for the interaction

3.q: A novel vacuolar Na+/H+ exchanger, CgNHX1, was cloned from a halophytic species Chenopodium glaucum
